THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TREVINO, JOSEPH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 135 - 6TH STREET, #402, S.F., STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. DEFT WILL LEAVE ROOM IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. PLTF TO PAY DEFT $600- BY CHECK FOR MOVING EXPENSES. THE CHECK TO BE DELIVERED TO DEF COUNSEL NO LATER THAN 5PM 3/28/97. FAILURE TO DELIVER CHECK AS NOTED ABOVE, DEFT WILL BE ENTITLED TO STAY OF EVICTION. PLTF WVS BACK RENT & DAMAGES THRU 3/31/97.
